title: Glimpse of Mathan at Bharat Mandapam #creator #apratihast
description:
Content Creators Meet🇮🇳

The Founder and CEO of IDIGITALPRENEUR, Mr. Ashutosh Pratihast, was invited to Bharat Mandapam for ‘Manthan’ - an interaction with the Honorable Minister of Commerce & Industry, Piyush Goyal and Sports Minister, Mr. Anurag Thakur, on 20th Oct 2023.💥

In this remarkable event, 40 of India’s Top YouTube influencers, including Abhi Niyu, Technical Guruji, Gaurav Thakur, Ankur Wariko, and Supriya Paul, co-founder of Josh Talks came together. Leaders from various ministries were present, discussing a critical topic: ‘How India can become a developed nation, and how influencers can contribute to making India a developed nation.’

Mr. Ashutosh Pratihast shared his vision for IDIGITALPRENEUR and discussed the practical implementation of the new education policy📚

This incredible moment is a testament to his countless days of hard work, and his unwavering spirit. 🌠

Brimming With Pride🔥

#india #manthan #creator #apratihast #government #g20 #idigitalpreneur #instagood
